Design: The subset covered (i.e., EPC class G and F); include both owner-occupied and rented units — without disproportionate exemptions for rentals (Art. 9(2) fifth sub-paragraph).
Quantify the portion of the national trajectory met through MEPS vs. other instruments (grants, building code triggers).
Staged thresholds: G→F by 2028; G/F→E by 2030, aligned with funding and contractor capacity.
Use EPC registry + tax/cadastre; HOA registries for MABs; targeted outreach to landlords and property managers.
